# Borehole Driller Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-borehole-driller-borehole-drilling
**Vertical slug:** borehole-driller
**VN-ID:** VN-CON-005
**Niche family:** standalone
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
With FWSC (Federal Water Supply Corporation) and state water boards unable to serve over 60% of urban Nigerians with reliable pipe-borne water, borehole drilling has become an essential construction service. Nigeria has an estimated 2–5 million borehole installations. Key clients: residential estates, churches, schools, hospitals, factories, government buildings, and hotels. COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) registration is required for consulting engineers. State-level drilling contractor licences vary. A standard 100m borehole with casing, pump, and water treatment in Lagos costs ₦1.5M–₦3M. Solar-powered borehole systems are increasingly popular (₦2.5M–₦5M). Services also include borehole rehabilitation, pumping systems, elevated storage tanks.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Mr Tunde Badmus, Estate Developer, Lekki** — Building a 30-unit estate. Needs a 150m borehole, water treatment, and elevated tank. Budget: ₦4M+.
- **Rev Father Emmanuel Okafor, Parish Priest, Asaba** — Parish borehole failed. Needs rehabilitation and new submersible pump.
- **Mrs Hadiza Musa, School Principal, Abuja** — Private school needs a reliable water source for 500 students. Budget: ₦2M.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Company brand, COREN certification, services overview, WhatsApp quote CTA, past projects gallery
- **About**: Engineering team credentials, COREN registration, years of experience, equipment fleet
- **Services**: Borehole drilling (depth ranges), casing and pump installation, water treatment, solar borehole systems, tank installation, borehole rehabilitation — with NGN price guides
- **Contact**: WhatsApp quote request, site visit booking, office address, NDPR enquiry form

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Technical competence meets reliable service. Engineers speak to builders, developers, institutions. Taglines: "Clean Water. Every Day. Guaranteed", "COREN-Certified Borehole Engineers for Nigeria". Primary CTA: "Get a Free Quote (WhatsApp)". Secondary CTA: "Our Services". AVOID: overpromising water quality without proper treatment context.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- COREN registration number (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria)
- State drilling contractor licence (Lagos, FCT, Rivers — state specific)
- Equipment list (drilling rig make/model, depth capacity)
- Project portfolio with photos: estates, churches, schools
- NIS (Nigerian Institution of Surveyors) or related professional body where applicable
- Water quality test results displayed (WHO/NAFDAC standards)
- Paystack/bank transfer for mobilisation fees

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. A large rotary drilling rig in operation at a Lekki estate site — safety signs visible
2. Engineers in hard hats and safety vests inspecting a newly completed borehole casing
3. Solar borehole system installation: panels + pump + elevated tank — rural school setting
4. Water sample being tested in a field kit — clear, clean water flowing
5. COREN certificate framed in a site office alongside project photos
6. Underground water pipe connection at a new estate water supply point
7. Grateful estate residents and manager shaking hands with the drilling contractor at project completion

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- COREN registration number (mandatory for engineering firms)
- State drilling contractor licence (varies by state)
- NESREA/Environmental Impact Assessment (for large projects)
- Water quality test compliance (NAFDAC/WHO standards)
- FWSC (Federal Works and Housing) notification for large projects
- NDPR-compliant client data handling
- Professional indemnity insurance

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- WhatsApp quote CTA on home + contact ✅
- All prices in NGN ✅
- Nigerian cities (Lagos, Abuja, PH, Enugu, Kano) ✅
- Nigerian engineer and client names ✅
- COREN trust signal ✅
- Paystack/bank transfer for mobilisation fees ✅
- 375px mobile responsive ✅
- esc() on all user strings ✅
- NDPR consent on enquiry form ✅
